result.status_detail: Block warning rendered with 차단; matches W4+W6 baseline (W5.1 dispatch refactor inert for other WS services)

notes: GUI method (clipboard paste into Ask anything input, Enter submit, 60s wait). Assistant message replaced by warning: '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. / This request has been blocked due to sensitive information detected.' Contains expected text 차단. W5.1 regression: copilot_chat_send migrated to DB-driven emit_ws_envelope; huggingface (non-copilot) outcome IDENTICAL to baseline — refactor did not affect other services. Note: initial Type with label resolved to (0,0) and stole focus to Claude window; recovered by maximizing HuggingChat, clicking input by real coords, clipboard paste. No stray message sent to other windows.
